parameters.query:
WITH monthly_funnel AS (
  SELECT
    a.origen,
    CASE
      WHEN a.estado = 'REGISTRADO' THEN 'Registrados'
      WHEN a.estado = 'ACTIVO' THEN 'Activos'
      WHEN a.estado = 'PAUSADO' THEN 'Pausados'
      WHEN a.estado = 'BAJA' THEN 'Baja'
      ELSE 'Otros'
    END as etapa,
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.id)::integer as cantidad
  FROM alumnos a
  WHERE
    DATE(a.fecha_registro) >= '{{ $json.query.startDate }}'::date
    AND DATE(a.fecha_registro) <= '{{ $json.query.endDate }}'::date
  GROUP BY a.origen, etapa
)
SELECT
  origen,
  JSON_OBJECT_AGG(etapa, cantidad) as etapas
FROM monthly_funnel
GROUP BY origen
ORDER BY origen;
